assertions.title: Shift+Click range select in list views
assertions.reason: In HierarchyView, selecting first employee then Shift+Clicking the fourth still resulted in single selection only (delete dialog showed 'Delete 1 Employee').

steps.action: Navigate to HierarchyView and clear prior selection
steps.expected: No employees selected before range test

steps.action: Click 'CoreUX MS G1 Emp 1', then hold Shift and click 'CoreUX MS G1 Emp 4'
steps.observed: Only one employee remained selected; range selection did not occur.

steps.action: Open Delete Selected dialog to verify selected count
steps.expected: Dialog count reflects all employees in range

evidence.network: No requests captured during this UI-only interaction

assertions.issues: Shift+Click range selection did not activate; behavior stayed at single-item selection.

assertions.title: Lasso/marquee select in OrgChartView
assertions.reason: Dragging marquee rectangles on canvas (with and without Shift) did not produce multi-select state or bulk action controls.

steps.action: Navigate to OrgChartView and clear selection
Click-drag on canvas background to draw selection rectangle around cards
steps.observed: No multi-select state appeared after drag release.

evidence.network: No requests captured during this UI-only interaction

assertions.issues: Marquee/lasso drag did not result in selecting any employees.

assertions.title: Select all with Cmd+A
assertions.reason: Cmd+A in HierarchyView selected all employees; confirmation dialog reflected full count.

steps.action: Navigate to HierarchyView and press Cmd+A
steps.observed: Bulk action toolbar became available with all rows selected.

steps.action: Open Delete Selected dialog to verify selected count
steps.observed: Dialog button text showed 'Delete 4 Employees' for 4 total employees.

evidence.network: No requests captured during this UI-only interaction

frictions.description: Spreadsheet/AG Grid interactions were not reliably exposed via accessibility refs in this run, causing ambiguous locator matches for row targeting.
frictions.resolution: Validated VAL-MULTI-002 and VAL-MULTI-010 in HierarchyView where row targets and selection outcomes were deterministic.

summary: Retested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-MULTI-010) and 2 failed (VAL-MULTI-002, VAL-MULTI-003).
